expectations.text: References at least one script by filename
expectations.evidence: References all 6 scripts by filename: cost_anomaly_detector.py, find_unused_resources.py, rightsizing_analyzer.py, detect_old_generations.py, analyze_ri_recommendations.py, and spot_recommendations.py. Complete execution checklist with full invocation commands provided at the end

Includes numerous CLI commands: 'python3 scripts/cost_anomaly_detector.py --days 30 --region us-east-1', 'aws ec2 describe-reserved-instances --region us-east-1 ...', 'aws cloudtrail lookup-events ...', 'aws autoscaling describe-auto-scaling-groups ...', 'aws budgets create-budget ...', and many more

expectations.text: Links to a relevant reference file
expectations.evidence: References the FinOps governance framework (corresponding to references/finops_governance.md) in Phase 5: 'Following the FinOps governance framework' with Week 1-4 monthly review process. Also references the monthly report template at assets/templates/monthly_cost_report.md

Follows the 5-phase Discover-Analyze-Prioritize-Implement-Monitor workflow from the aws-cost-optimization skill. Phases are explicitly labeled: Phase 1 Discover, Phase 2 Analyze, Phase 3 Prioritize, Phase 4 Respond/Implement, Phase 5 Monitor

Provides tiered remediation: Tier 1 (Immediate, this week) with 5 actions, Tier 2 (This Month) with 4 actions, Tier 3 (Next Quarter) with 4 actions. Each tier includes estimated savings, effort, and risk. Includes CFO communication framework and complete 6-step script execution checklist
